<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\HttpKernel\Controller\ArgumentResolver; use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Request; use Symfony\Component\HttpKernel\Controller\ValueResolverInterface; use Symfony\Component\HttpKernel\ControllerMetadata\ArgumentMetadata; /** * Yields a non-variadic argument's value from the request attributes. * * @author Iltar van der Berg <kjarli@gmail.com> */ final class RequestAttributeValueResolver implements ValueResolverInterface { public function resolve(Request $request, ArgumentMetadata $argument): array { return !$argument->isVariadic() && $request->attributes->has($argument->getName()) ? [$request->attributes->get($argument->getName())] : []; } }
